scripts.build:wasm: node ../../../scripts/ci/copy-file.mjs ../hello-world/dist/refarm_hello_world_plugin.wasm public/hello-world-plugin.wasm && jco transpile public/hello-world-plugin.wasm -o src/generated --name hello-world --map refarm:sdk/kernel-bridge=../kernel-bridge.js
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && (vite build --configLoader runner || echo 'Skipping production build: Generated JS missing')
scripts.preview:test:ci: node -e "process.exit(require('fs').existsSync('dist-vscode') ? 0 : 1)" && npm run preview:test || (echo 'dist-vscode missing; building before preview...' && npm run build && npm run preview:test)
